ANC Box_Renault_v0.1

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 782
Recv ID: 7A2
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 86
Func Name: AAU -Audio Amplifier Unit

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "21",
    "supplier": "398",
    "soft": "FFFF",
    "version": "FFFF"
  }
]

    "replybytes": "54",

    "sentbytes": "14FFFFFF",
    "name": "ClearDiagnosticInformation.All",
